fact_nuggets.text: Regenerator (Japanese: Regenerative Power) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI Restores some HP when the Pokemon goes to a different floor. * When the Pokemon goes to a different floor, some of its HP is restored! * S MD When the Pokemon goes to a different floor, some of its HP is restored!

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Regenerator restores 33% of the Pokemon's maximum HP upon switching out. This includes through the use of moves that switch the user out , such as Baton Pass and Volt Switch , and moves used by opposing Pokemon that force it to switch , such as Whirlwind and Dragon Tail . This effect will occur if Regenerator is the Pokemon's Ability in battle when it switches out and is not suppressed; a Pokemon that obtained the Ability with Trace or Role Play will restore HP when it switches out, whereas a Pokemon which has Regenerator but has been affected by Gastro Acid will not. Heal Block does not prevent Regenerator from restoring HP. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Regenerator has no effect outside of battle.

Heal Block does not prevent Regenerator from restoring HP.
Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
